# Hps Alta

**Summary**: A specialized apparatus for measuring the kinetics of gas hydrate formation under high pressure.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-habiburrahman|HABIBURRAHMAN, 2024]] utilized HPS-ALTA to evaluate the kinetics of CO2 hydrate formation with various chemical promoters.

## Key Results and Findings

- The system enabled precise, reproducible measurements through constant cooling cycles, providing statistical distributions of subcooling temperatures. ([[2024-habiburrahman|HABIBURRAHMAN, 2024, p. 53]])
